products.name: Nova
products.descriptor: Award-winning near-range lidar powered by OEM-validated MMT®

evidence.snippet:
Nova
====
_Award-winning, widely deployed near-range lidar, powered by Cepton's
OEM-validated Micro Motion Technology (MMT®)_
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/63cec92432f15791c9dface0/6745dd151805176b3995dbb1_Nova%203.png)

products.name: Nova Ultra
products.descriptor: Next-generation near-range lidar with MagnoSteer™ for smart vehicles and spaces

evidence.snippet:
### Nova Ultra
NEAR RANGE
_Embeddable, scalable, the versatile fit-for-all lidar for smart vehicles, systems and spaces._

While Nova has been applied across various automotive and industrial applications, Cepton has developed a next-generation product for near-range sensing, Nova Ultra, powered by the latest Cepton MagnoSteer™ imaging technology to enable higher performance in a smaller form factor.

products.name: Vista® Ultra
products.descriptor: Long-range adaptive lidar for ADAS and autonomous driving

evidence.snippet:
### Vista® Ultra
LONG RANGE
_Adaptive, powerful, the ultimate all-in-one lidar for ADAS and autonomous driving._
[Learn More](/products/vista-ultra)

products.name: Helius®
products.descriptor: Smart lidar system with edge computing and perception software for anonymized 3D detection

evidence.snippet:
Helius®
=======
_The Helius Smart Lidar System combines Cepton's state-of-the-art lidar technology with aperception software to provide intelligent, anonymized 3D perception._

The Helius Smart Lidar System combines Cepton's state-of-the-art, patented, MMT® lidar technology with edge computing and ground-breaking perception software, to provide intelligent, anonymized 3D perception.

products.name: StudioViz™
products.descriptor: Virtual tool for lidar data visualization, performance validation, and solution customization

evidence.snippet:
DATA SIMULATOR
StudioViz™
==========
A powerful virtual tool for data visualization, performance validation and solution customization, helping expedite lidar adoption from productization to deployment.
